name: Transcom, Inc.
summary: Transcom, Inc. operates as a microwave device and subsystem company in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers wideband and narrowband solid-state power amplifiers; MIC and transceiver modules; FET chips; packaged FETs; monolithic microwave integrated circuits (MMIC); hybrid ICs; directional couplers; power dividers; fixed attenuators and termination; and MIS chip capacitors. It also provides MMIC foundry services. Transcom, Inc. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.
